126.reason: IndexOutOfBoundsException may occur if there is only 1 token remaining (the last one) and preRead tries to access index size (out of bounds). Although hasNext ensures at least 1, preRead(1) needs index position+1 which might be equal to size.

reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.5 , reason:  IndexOutOfBoundsException may occur if there is only 1 token remaining (the last one) and preRead tries to access index size (out of bounds). Although hasNext ensures at least 1, preRead(1) needs index position+1 which might be equal to size.

3262.reason: This method does not check for index bounds. If the parser looks ahead beyond the end of the token list (e.g., in divideLVal when searching for a semicolon that doesn't exist or is misplaced due to previous errors), it will throw an IndexOutOfBoundsException, causing the program to crash and produce no output file.
